title: Training Assistant (Operations / Field-Based)
description:
📍 Location: Singapore (office + on-site operational locations)
💼 Employment Type: Full-time
💰 Salary Range: SGD 3,000 – 3,500 per month
🎁 Benefits: AWS + performance-based bonus

About the Company

Our client is a technology-driven company supporting maritime and industrial operations through innovative solutions and structured training programmes. The Singapore team works closely with frontline operations to ensure effective skills transfer, safety, and operational excellence.

Job Description

We are seeking a Training Assistant to support the coordination, delivery, and follow-up of training programmes for operational staff. This role involves both office-based coordination and on-site training support at docks and operational environments. It is suitable for candidates who are comfortable working outside a traditional office setting.

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate training schedules, venues, and resources

  • Support and assist in delivering on-site and classroom training sessions

  • Monitor training outcomes and collect feedback

  • Assist in identifying training needs aligned with operational improvements

  • Support the development of basic training materials and assessment tools

Requirements

  • Able to communicate effectively in English for work coordination

  • Ability to communicate in Mandarin is required to support work-related communication

  • Ability to communicate in Malay is an advantage

  • Strong organisational and coordination skills

  • Comfortable working in operational and field environments

  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to work with teams from different backgrounds

Working Hours

  • Monday to Friday (office hours as base)

  • Flexibility required depending on training schedules and operational needs

📩 Interested applicants are encouraged to apply via MyCareersFuture.
Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
